title: Node Programme | Logos
description: Sign up for early access to the Logos node programme and help decentralise the network.

hero.title: Be the first to join the node programme
hero.body: Sign up for early access to the upcoming node programme and help decentralise the network.

builders.title: Calling builders and node operators
builders.body: The node programme is for anyone who wants to join our movement to revitalise civil society using decentralised technologies. Whether you are a builder or a node operator, there is a role for you.
builders.imageAlt: Logos node programme builders and node operators

stack.title: The Logos technology stack is a unified ecosystem.

items.title: Blockchain
items.body: Advanced privacy for a new era of decentralised applications and social institutions.

items.title: Messaging
items.body: Private peer-to-peer communication that resists surveillance and censorship.

items.title: Storage
items.body: Secure decentralised storage enabling fully decentralised apps and file sharing.

useCases.title: Use cases.
useCases.titleMuted: We know today's systems are captured and brittle. We build alternatives to give people a choice. Build on Logos and serve your community.

items.title: Community governance
items.body: Self-organising groups that define and enforce their own rules, voluntarily and transparently.

items.title: Corruption-resistant public registries
items.body: Tamper-proof records for votes, land, licences, and trade agreements.

items.title: Private financial networks
items.body: Money that moves securely and freely, without borders.

items.title: Decentralised archives
items.body: Permanent, censorship-resistant preservation of knowledge, culture, and history.

items.title: Secure communications
items.body: Resilient, private messaging for coordination in hostile environments.

signup.title: Sign up for the node programme
signup.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
signup.genericError: Failed to submit. Please try again.
signup.imageAlt: Forest landscape for the Logos node programme
